substitution_rationale: User requested spawned Codex agents; Claude tool unavailable in current tool context; critique performed by Codex subagent using inherited frontier GPT-5-class model.
required_changes: Make the automation-mode primer more explicit about why unreliable airspeed changes the working contract.
Clarify that angle of attack is useful in reconstruction but was not a simple crew-facing cue.
Soften the closing shorthand so the stall remains the final aerodynamic state, not the whole explanation.
optional_changes: Add a short legal-status end note only if Mike asks for it.
Carry the angle-of-attack caveat into later visual planning if FDR parameter graphics are used.
source_factual_cautions: Do not flatten the accident into pilot error or weather.
Do not imply the crew had a clean angle-of-attack cue that named the stall.
Use CVR only as source-safe sequence support, not character psychology.
Keep legal context separate from BEA safety findings unless Mike explicitly asks for an end note.
